text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A package containing her signature racewear gets
delivered to Haru Urara.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! It's finally here!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! It's so cool to run in my own signature
racewear!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Look! Isn't it awesome?! Doesn't it make me look
so cool and strong?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know! I'm gonna show it off to everyone!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Look, everyone! I got my own racewear!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She cheerfully runs about without pause. The
racewear seems to raise her motivation, so I let it
be for now, but...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Can I wear it during today's
training?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! I can wear it during lunch too,
right?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Can I wear it to bed?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Awww! But I feel, like, a hundred times stronger
when I wear it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So, um... I'm sure it'll make me sleep like a baby!
choice_data_list: You really like it that much, huh.
You really like it that much, huh.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
This design is based on the uniform I was wearing
the very first time I ran a race.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I didn't win anything back then, but my mom and
dad always praised me anyway!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So I feel super powerful when I wear it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
So I wanna wear it a whole bunch and get
stronger...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And if I win while wearing it, they'll be so proud!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So, please, Trainer!
choice_data_list:
It'd be terrible to wear out something so
precious.
Wear it as much as you like!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wear out?! That'd be horrible!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I wouldn't want to ruin something so nice...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I can wear it whenever I win! Okay! I'm
gonna do my best to win so I can wear it again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Excited by the idea of wearing her racewear
during her next race, Haru Urara puts her all into
her training.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh, really?! Yaaay!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna train super-duper hard so I can wear it
in a real race!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee. Thanks, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After wearing it non-stop for a while, it seems she
is satisfied. At which point, she asks me to keep it
safe and sound until the proper moment.
